description: Run an explicit-solvent OpenMM molecular dynamics simulation of a protein in water.
functions: Prepares the input protein with PDBFixer (standardizes residues, adds missing atoms and hydrogens at the specified pH).
Parameterizes with Amber ff14SB and solvates in a TIP3P water box with neutralizing Na+/Cl- ions via tleap.
Runs energy minimization, restrained equilibration (full then reduced heavy-atom restraints), and unrestrained NPT production with Langevin dynamics.
Post-processes the production trajectory with PBC correction, Cα alignment, and downsampling for analysis.
Computes Cα RMSD, radius of gyration, per-residue RMSF, 2D RMSD, and residue-wise Pearson cross-correlation, saving plots and CSVs.

inputs.name: protein
inputs.descr: Input protein structure (PDB). Het atoms and crystallographic waters are stripped before simulation.

inputs.name: pressure
inputs.descr: Target pressure for the Monte Carlo barostat.

inputs.name: pH
inputs.descr: pH used by PDBFixer when adding hydrogens to set protonation states.

inputs.name: paddingNm
inputs.descr: Minimum distance between the protein and the edge of the TIP3P water box.

inputs.name: ionicStrength
inputs.descr: Target ionic strength used for neutralization (NaCl).

inputs.name: forceConstant
inputs.descr: Harmonic restraint strength on protein heavy atoms during equilibration. Halved in the second half of equilibration and removed during production.

inputs.name: equilibrationTime
inputs.descr: Total restrained equilibration length in nanoseconds.

inputs.name: equilTrajFreq
inputs.descr: Steps between frames saved during equilibration.

inputs.name: prodTrajFreq
inputs.descr: Steps between frames saved during production.

inputs.name: analysisStride
inputs.descr: Downsampling stride applied to the production trajectory before analysis.

inputs.name: stepSize
inputs.descr: Frame stride applied specifically to the pairwise 2D RMSD computation.
